ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "taxonomy_id" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species the population belongs to */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the population */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the population */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the population's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the population's location */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last population survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_populations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the season */,
  "average_precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental run */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population the run belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the run belongs to */,
  "run_type" TEXT /* Type of the run (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experimental run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experimental run */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the environmental conditions during the run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_runs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_runs_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergence_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experimental run the data belongs to */,
  "mean_emergence" REAL /* Mean emergence rate */,
  "median_emergence" REAL /* Median emergence rate */,
  "q1" REAL /* First quartile */,
  "q3" REAL /* Third quartile */,
  "first" INTEGER /* First emergence */,
  "last" INTEGER /* Last emergence */,
  "sd" REAL /* Standard deviation */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used to calculate the metrics */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the mean emergence rate */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergence_data_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES experimental_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, research assistant) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization affiliated with the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who published the work */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which the permission applies */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module to which the permission applies (e.g., data, users, publications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has the role */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "permission_ids" TEXT /* List of permission IDs associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
